# solana-brain

> The brain for building and operating an entire Solana company. One installable skill that
> classifies any request, routes it to one of five clusters, orchestrates cross-functional
> workflows with gates, and delegates depth to ecosystem skills. Read-only / key-safe.

Version: 0.1.0 (current as of 2026-06). License: MIT. Targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor.

## Entry
- [skill/SKILL.md](skill/SKILL.md): the brain — intake → classify → route → orchestrate → verify.
- [skill/RESOLVER.md](skill/RESOLVER.md): intent → cluster routing table (read to classify).

## Clusters
- [skill/clusters/build.md](skill/clusters/build.md): programs (Anchor/Pinocchio) + client apps (landing, tx-safety, Actions/Blinks, streaming).
- [skill/clusters/ship.md](skill/clusters/ship.md): RPC, deploy, CI/CD, observability, reliability, on-call.
- [skill/clusters/secure.md](skill/clusters/secure.md): audits, client tx-safety, custody, supply chain, incident response (the gate).
- [skill/clusters/grow.md](skill/clusters/grow.md): GTM, token launch, community, fundraising, hackathons.
- [skill/clusters/operate.md](skill/clusters/operate.md): legal, tax, treasury, entity, hiring (informational only).

## References
- [skill/references/orchestration.md](skill/references/orchestration.md): gated multi-cluster playbooks (0→1, mainnet, token launch, raise, incident).
- [skill/references/ecosystem-map.md](skill/references/ecosystem-map.md): which specialist skill each cluster delegates to.
- [skill/references/company-lifecycle.md](skill/references/company-lifecycle.md): idea→devnet→mainnet→scale; needs per stage.
- [skill/references/accuracy-and-safety.md](skill/references/accuracy-and-safety.md): rules of engagement.
- [skill/references/changelog-pinning.md](skill/references/changelog-pinning.md): versioning + maintenance.

## Agents
- [agents/chief-of-staff.md](agents/chief-of-staff.md) (orchestrator) + build/ship/secure/grow/operate-lead.

## Commands
- [commands/brain.md](commands/brain.md), company-setup, ship-it, launch-token, raise, incident.

## Rules
- [rules/brain-first.md](rules/brain-first.md), [rules/safety-and-keys.md](rules/safety-and-keys.md).

## Install
- One-liner: `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sushant6095/solana-brain/main/install.sh | bash`
- Agent flow: [INSTALL_FOR_AGENTS.md](INSTALL_FOR_AGENTS.md). Also npx/bun/brew (see README.md).
